candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not the target; included only as opposite classification from candidate list.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash balance; preferred over cash flow period-end duplicate.
Restricted/pledged cash, not the main CHE target.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of the period
candidates.why: Matches ending cash, but balance-sheet line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the begining of the period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the target balance-sheet CHE.

candidates.row_label: Changes in cash deposits and pledges
candidates.why: Cash flow movement, not the balance-sheet cash stock.
Not related to cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as requested.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Not the target; wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Clearly short-term borrowing component, but may not capture all current debt because a broader current Loans and borrowings line exists.
The current-section 'Loans and borrowings' line appears to represent total current borrowings and is preferable to components; excludes lease-specific rows.
Represents current portion of long-term debt, but likely overlaps with current Loans and borrowings and would risk double counting if both selected.

variables.notes: Chose the current-section 'Loans and borrowings' as the clean total short-term/current debt measure. Excluded lease rows per instruction and avoided adding 'Bank loans and overdrafts' or 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities 1 year' to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Direct reported PPE line; preferred over gross and accumulated depreciation components.
Gross PPE component, less preferred than reported net PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Accumulated depreciation of Property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Contra-asset, not the target by itself.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related right-of-use asset gross amount; not baseline PPE target if a direct PPE line exists.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of intangible assets and property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow capex line, not a balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Disposal of intangible assets and property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow disposal line, not the target.

variables.notes: Preferred the direct PPE balance-sheet line over gross/accumulated detail rows.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Contra-asset line, not total assets.
Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Direct operating cash flow line from cash flow statement.
